verses.text: <ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>华<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huá</rt></ruby><ruby>从<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">cónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>会<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huì</rt></ruby><ruby>幕<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">mù</rt></ruby><ruby>中<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>呼<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hū</rt></ruby><ruby>叫<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiào</rt></ruby><ruby>摩<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Mó</rt></ruby><ruby>西<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xī</rt></ruby>，<ruby>对<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">duì</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shuō</rt></ruby>：

“<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>晓<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xiǎo</rt></ruby><ruby class="CharOverride-1">谕<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yù</rt></ruby><ruby>以<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>色<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sè</rt></ruby><ruby>列<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">liè</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shuō</rt></ruby>：<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>中<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>间<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiān</rt></ruby><ruby>若<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ruò</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>献<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xiàn</rt></ruby><ruby>供<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡònɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>物<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wù</rt></ruby><ruby>给<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡěi</rt></ruby><ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>华<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huá</rt></ruby>，<ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>从<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">cónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>牛<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">niú</rt></ruby><ruby>群<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qún</rt></ruby><ruby>羊<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yánɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>群<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qún</rt></ruby><ruby>中<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhōnɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>献<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xiàn</rt></ruby><ruby>牲<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shēnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>畜<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chù</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wéi</rt></ruby><ruby>供<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡònɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>物<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wù</rt></ruby>。

“<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Tā</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>供<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡònɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>物<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wù</rt></ruby><ruby>若<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ruò</rt></ruby><ruby>以<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>牛<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">niú</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wéi</rt></ruby><ruby class="CharOverride-1">燔<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fán</rt></ruby><ruby>祭<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jì</rt></ruby>，<ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>会<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huì</rt></ruby><ruby>幕<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">mù</rt></ruby><ruby>门<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">mén</rt></ruby><ruby>口<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">kǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>献<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xiàn</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yī</rt></ruby><ruby>只<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhī</rt></ruby><ruby>没<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">méi</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>残<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">cán</rt></ruby><ruby>疾<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ji</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>公<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>牛<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">niú</rt></ruby>，<ruby>可<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">kě</rt></ruby><ruby>以<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>华<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huá</rt></ruby><ruby>面<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">miàn</rt></ruby><ruby>前<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qián</rt></ruby><ruby>蒙<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ménɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>悦<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yuè</rt></ruby><ruby>纳<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nà</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Tā</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>按<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">àn</rt></ruby><ruby>手<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby class="CharOverride-1">燔<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fán</rt></ruby><ruby>祭<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jì</rt></ruby><ruby>牲<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shēnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>头<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tóu</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shɑnɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby class="CharOverride-1">燔<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fán</rt></ruby><ruby>祭<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jì</rt></ruby><ruby>便<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">biàn</rt></ruby><ruby>蒙<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ménɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>悦<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yuè</rt></ruby><ruby>纳<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nà</rt></ruby>，<ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>赎<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shú</rt></ruby><ruby>罪<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zuì</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Tā</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>华<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huá</rt></ruby><ruby>面<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">miàn</rt></ruby><ruby>前<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qián</rt></ruby><ruby>宰<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zǎi</rt></ruby><ruby>公<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>牛<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">niú</rt></ruby>；<ruby>亚<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yà</rt></ruby><ruby>伦<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lún</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>孙<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sūn</rt></ruby><ruby>作<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zuò</rt></ruby><ruby>祭<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jì</rt></ruby><ruby>司<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sī</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby>，<ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>奉<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fènɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>血<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xuè</rt></ruby>，<ruby>把<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bǎ</rt></ruby><ruby>血<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xuè</rt></ruby><ruby>洒<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sǎ</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>会<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huì</rt></ruby><ruby>幕<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">mù</rt></ruby><ruby>门<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">mén</rt></ruby><ruby>口<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">kǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>坛<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tán</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>周<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhōu</rt></ruby><ruby>围<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wéi</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>那<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Nà</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>剥<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bāo</rt></ruby><ruby>去<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qù</rt></ruby><ruby class="CharOverride-1">燔<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fán</rt></ruby><ruby>祭<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jì</rt></ruby><ruby>牲<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shēnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>皮<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">pí</rt></ruby>，<ruby>把<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bǎ</rt></ruby><ruby class="CharOverride-1">燔<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fán</rt></ruby><ruby>祭<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jì</rt></ruby><ruby>牲<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shēnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>切<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qiē</rt></ruby><ruby>成<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chénɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>块<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">kuài</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zi</rt></ruby>。
祭Jì司sī亚Yà伦lún的de子zǐ孙sūn，要yào把bǎ火huǒ放fànɡ在zài坛tán上shɑnɡ，把bǎ柴chái摆bǎi在zài火huǒ上shànɡ。

<ruby>亚<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yà</rt></ruby><ruby>伦<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lún</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>孙<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sūn</rt></ruby><ruby>作<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zuò</rt></ruby><ruby>祭<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jì</rt></ruby><ruby>司<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sī</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby>，<ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>把<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bǎ</rt></ruby><ruby>肉<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ròu</rt></ruby><ruby>块<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">kuài</rt></ruby><ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>头<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tóu</rt></ruby><ruby>并<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>脂<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhī</rt></ruby><ruby>油<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yóu</rt></ruby>，<ruby>摆<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bǎi</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>坛<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tán</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shɑnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>火<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>柴<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chái</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shɑnɡ</rt></ruby>。
但Dàn燔fán祭jì的de脏zànɡ腑fǔ与yǔ腿tuǐ，要yào用yònɡ水shuǐ洗xǐ，祭jì司sī就jiù要yào把bǎ一yí切qiè全quán烧shāo在zài坛tán上shɑnɡ，当dànɡ作zuò燔fán祭jì，献xiàn与yǔ耶Yē和hé华huá为wéi馨xīn香xiānɡ的de火huǒ祭jì。

“<ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Rén</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>供<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡònɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>物<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wù</rt></ruby><ruby>若<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ruò</rt></ruby><ruby>以<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>绵<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">mián</rt></ruby><ruby>羊<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yánɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>或<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huò</rt></ruby><ruby>山<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shān</rt></ruby><ruby>羊<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yánɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wéi</rt></ruby><ruby class="CharOverride-1">燔<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fán</rt></ruby><ruby>祭<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jì</rt></ruby>，<ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>献<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xiàn</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>没<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">méi</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>残<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">cán</rt></ruby><ruby>疾<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ji</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>公<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>羊<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yánɡ</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yào</rt></ruby><ruby>把<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bǎ</rt></ruby><ruby>羊<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yánɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>宰<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zǎi</rt></ruby><ruby>于<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yú</rt></ruby><ruby>坛<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tán</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>北<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">běi</rt></ruby><ruby>边<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">biɑn</rt></ruby>，<ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>华<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huá</rt></ruby><ruby>面<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">miàn</rt></ruby><ruby>前<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qián</rt></ruby>；<ruby>亚<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yà</rt></ruby><ruby>伦<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lún</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>孙<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sūn</rt></ruby><ruby>作<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zuò</rt></ruby><ruby>祭<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jì</rt></ruby><ruby>司<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sī</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby>，<ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>把<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bǎ</rt></ruby><ruby>羊<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yánɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>血<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xuè</rt></ruby><ruby>洒<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sǎ</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>坛<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tán</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>周<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhōu</rt></ruby><ruby>围<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wéi</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yào</rt></ruby><ruby>把<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bǎ</rt></ruby><ruby class="CharOverride-1">燔<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fán</rt></ruby><ruby>祭<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jì</rt></ruby><ruby>牲<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shēnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>切<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qiē</rt></ruby><ruby>成<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chénɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>块<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">kuài</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zi</rt></ruby>，<ruby>连<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lián</rt></ruby><ruby>头<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tóu</rt></ruby><ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>脂<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhī</rt></ruby><ruby>油<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yóu</rt></ruby>，<ruby>祭<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jì</rt></ruby><ruby>司<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sī</rt></ruby><ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>摆<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bǎi</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>坛<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tán</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shɑnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>火<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>柴<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chái</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shɑnɡ</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>但<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Dàn</rt></ruby><ruby>脏<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>腑<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>与<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>腿<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tuǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>用<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yònɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>水<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shuǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>洗<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xǐ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>祭<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jì</rt></ruby><ruby>司<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sī</rt></ruby><ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>全<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">quán</rt></ruby><ruby>然<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rán</rt></ruby><ruby>奉<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fènɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>献<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xiàn</rt></ruby><ruby>烧<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shāo</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>坛<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tán</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shɑnɡ</rt></ruby>。<ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby class="CharOverride-1">燔<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fán</rt></ruby><ruby>祭<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jì</rt></ruby>，<ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>献<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xiàn</rt></ruby><ruby>与<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>华<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huá</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wéi</rt></ruby><ruby class="CharOverride-1">馨<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xīn</rt></ruby><ruby>香<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xiānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>火<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>祭<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jì</rt></ruby>。

“<ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Rén</rt></ruby><ruby>奉<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fènɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>给<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡěi</rt></ruby><ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>华<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huá</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>供<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡònɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>物<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wù</rt></ruby>，<ruby>若<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ruò</rt></ruby><ruby>以<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>鸟<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">niǎo</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wéi</rt></ruby><ruby class="CharOverride-1">燔<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fán</rt></ruby><ruby>祭<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jì</rt></ruby>，<ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>献<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xiàn</rt></ruby><ruby>斑<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bān</rt></ruby><ruby class="CharOverride-1">鸠<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiū</rt></ruby><ruby>或<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huò</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>雏<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chú</rt></ruby><ruby>鸽<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡē</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wéi</rt></ruby><ruby>供<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡònɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>物<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wù</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>华<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">huá</rt></ruby><ruby>对<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">duì</rt></ruby><ruby>摩<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Mó</rt></ruby><ruby>西<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xī</rt></ruby>、<ruby>亚<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Yà</rt></ruby><ruby>伦<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">lún</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shuō</rt></ruby>：

“<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">men</rt></ruby><ruby>晓<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xiǎo</rt></ruby><ruby class="CharOverride-1">谕<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yù</rt></ruby><ruby>以<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>色<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">sè</rt></ruby><ruby>列<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">liè</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shuō</rt></ruby>：<ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>若<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">ruò</rt></ruby><ruby>身<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shēn</rt></ruby><ruby>患<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">huàn</rt></ruby><ruby>漏<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">lòu</rt></ruby><ruby>症<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhènɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>因<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yīn</rt></ruby><ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>漏<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">lòu</rt></ruby><ruby>症<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhènɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>洁<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jié</rt></ruby><ruby>净<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">le</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Tā</rt></ruby><ruby>患<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">huàn</rt></ruby><ruby>漏<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">lòu</rt></ruby><ruby>症<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhènɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>无<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wú</rt></ruby><ruby>论<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">lùn</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>下<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xià</rt></ruby><ruby>流<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">liú</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby>，<ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>止<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>住<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhù</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby>，<ruby>都<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dōu</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>洁<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jié</rt></ruby><ruby>净<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jìnɡ</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Tā</rt></ruby><ruby>所<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">suǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>躺<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tǎnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby><ruby>床<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">chuánɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>都<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dōu</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>洁<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jié</rt></ruby><ruby>净<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jìnɡ</rt></ruby>；<ruby>所<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">suǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>坐<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zuò</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby><ruby>物<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wù</rt></ruby><ruby>也<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yě</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>洁<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jié</rt></ruby><ruby>净<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jìnɡ</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>凡<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Fán</rt></ruby><ruby>摸<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">mō</rt></ruby><ruby>那<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">nà</rt></ruby><ruby>床<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">chuánɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby>，<ruby>必<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bì</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>洁<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jié</rt></ruby><ruby>净<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>到<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dào</rt></ruby><ruby>晚<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shɑnɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>并<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>洗<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>衣<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yī</rt></ruby><ruby>服<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">fú</rt></ruby>，<ruby>用<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yònɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>水<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shuǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>洗<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>澡<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zǎo</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>若<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Ruò</rt></ruby><ruby>患<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">huàn</rt></ruby><ruby>漏<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">lòu</rt></ruby><ruby>症<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhènɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>吐<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>洁<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jié</rt></ruby><ruby>净<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>身<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shēn</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shɑnɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>那<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">nà</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>必<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bì</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>洁<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jié</rt></ruby><ruby>净<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>到<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dào</rt></ruby><ruby>晚<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shɑnɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>并<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>洗<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>衣<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yī</rt></ruby><ruby>服<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">fú</rt></ruby>，<ruby>用<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yònɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>水<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shuǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>洗<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>澡<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zǎo</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>凡<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Fán</rt></ruby><ruby>摸<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">mō</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">le</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>身<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shēn</rt></ruby><ruby>下<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xià</rt></ruby><ruby>之<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhī</rt></ruby><ruby>物<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wù</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby>，<ruby>必<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bì</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>洁<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jié</rt></ruby><ruby>净<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>到<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dào</rt></ruby><ruby>晚<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shɑnɡ</rt></ruby>；<ruby>拿<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">ná</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">le</rt></ruby><ruby>那<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">nà</rt></ruby><ruby>物<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wù</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby>，<ruby>必<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bì</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>洁<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jié</rt></ruby><ruby>净<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>到<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dào</rt></ruby><ruby>晚<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shɑnɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>并<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>洗<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>衣<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yī</rt></ruby><ruby>服<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">fú</rt></ruby>，<ruby>用<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yònɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>水<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shuǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>洗<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>澡<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zǎo</rt></ruby>。
患Huàn漏lòu症zhènɡ的de人rén没méi有yǒu用yònɡ水shuǐ涮shuàn手shǒu，无wú论lùn摸mō了le谁shuí，谁shuí必bì不bù洁jié净jìnɡ到dào晚wǎn上shànɡ，并bìnɡ要yào洗xǐ衣yī服fú，用yònɡ水shuǐ洗xǐ澡zǎo。

免Miǎn得de你nǐ们men玷diàn污wū那nà地dì的de时shí候hou，地dì就jiù把bǎ你nǐ们men吐tù出chū，像xiànɡ吐tù出chū在zài你nǐ们men以yǐ先xiān的de国ɡuó民mín一yí样yànɡ。

<ruby>除<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Chú</rt></ruby><ruby>非<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">fēi</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>骨<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">ɡǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>肉<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">ròu</rt></ruby><ruby>之<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhī</rt></ruby><ruby>亲<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">qīn</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby><ruby>父<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">fù</rt></ruby><ruby>母<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">mǔ</rt></ruby>、<ruby>儿<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">ér</rt></ruby><ruby>女<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">nǚ</rt></ruby>、<ruby>弟<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dì</rt></ruby><ruby>兄<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xiōnɡ</rt></ruby>，

<ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>未<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>曾<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">cénɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>出<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">chū</rt></ruby><ruby>嫁<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jià</rt></ruby><ruby>作<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zuò</rt></ruby><ruby>处<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">chǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>女<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">nǚ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby><ruby>姐<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jiě</rt></ruby><ruby>妹<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">mèi</rt></ruby>，<ruby>才<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">cái</rt></ruby><ruby>可<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">kě</rt></ruby><ruby>以<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>沾<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhān</rt></ruby><ruby>染<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">rǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>自<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zì</rt></ruby><ruby>己<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jǐ</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>祭<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Jì</rt></ruby><ruby>司<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">sī</rt></ruby><ruby>既<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jì</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>民<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">mín</rt></ruby><ruby>中<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>首<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shǒu</rt></ruby>，<ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>可<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">kě</rt></ruby><ruby>从<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">cónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>俗<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">sú</rt></ruby><ruby>沾<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhān</rt></ruby><ruby>染<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">rǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>自<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zì</rt></ruby><ruby>己<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jǐ</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Bù</rt></ruby><ruby>可<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">kě</rt></ruby><ruby>使<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>头<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tóu</rt></ruby><ruby>光<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">ɡuānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>秃<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tū</rt></ruby>，<ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>可<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">kě</rt></ruby><ruby>剃<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tì</rt></ruby><ruby>除<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">chú</rt></ruby><ruby>胡<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">hú</rt></ruby><ruby>须<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xū</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby><ruby>周<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhōu</rt></ruby><ruby>围<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wéi</rt></ruby>，<ruby>也<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yě</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>可<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">kě</rt></ruby><ruby>用<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yònɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>刀<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dāo</rt></ruby><ruby>划<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">huá</rt></ruby><ruby>身<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shēn</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Yào</rt></ruby><ruby>归<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">ɡuī</rt></ruby><ruby>神<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Shén</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>圣<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shènɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>可<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">kě</rt></ruby><ruby class="CharOverride-1">亵<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xiè</rt></ruby><ruby class="CharOverride-1">渎<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dú</rt></ruby><ruby>神<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Shén</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby><ruby>名<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">mínɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>因<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yīn</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yē</rt></ruby><ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>华<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">huá</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby><ruby>火<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">huǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>祭<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jì</rt></ruby>，<ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>神<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Shén</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby><ruby>食<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shí</rt></ruby><ruby>物<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wù</rt></ruby>，<ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">men</rt></ruby><ruby>献<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xiàn</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby>，<ruby>所<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">suǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>以<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">men</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>成<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">chénɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wéi</rt></ruby><ruby>圣<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shènɡ</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Bù</rt></ruby><ruby>可<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">kě</rt></ruby><ruby>娶<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">qǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>妓<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jì</rt></ruby><ruby>女<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">nǚ</rt></ruby><ruby>或<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">huò</rt></ruby><ruby>被<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bèi</rt></ruby><ruby>污<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wū</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby><ruby>女<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">nǚ</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">ren</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wéi</rt></ruby><ruby>妻<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">qī</rt></ruby>，<ruby>也<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yě</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>可<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">kě</rt></ruby><ruby>娶<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">qǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>被<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bèi</rt></ruby><ruby>休<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xiū</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby><ruby>妇<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">fù</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wéi</rt></ruby><ruby>妻<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">qī</rt></ruby>，<ruby>因<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yīn</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>祭<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jì</rt></ruby><ruby>司<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">sī</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>归<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">ɡuī</rt></ruby><ruby>神<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Shén</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>圣<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shènɡ</rt></ruby>。
所Suǒ以yǐ你nǐ要yào使shǐ他tā成chénɡ圣shènɡ，因yīn为wèi他tā奉fènɡ献xiàn你nǐ神Shén的de食shí物wù。你Nǐ要yào以yǐ他tā为wèi圣shènɡ，因yīn为wèi我wǒ使shǐ你nǐ们men成chénɡ圣shènɡ的de耶Yē和hé华huá是shì圣shènɡ的de。

<ruby>祭<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Jì</rt></ruby><ruby>司<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">sī</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby><ruby>女<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">nǚ</rt></ruby><ruby>儿<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">ér</rt></ruby><ruby>若<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">ruò</rt></ruby><ruby>行<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xínɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>淫<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yín</rt></ruby>，<ruby>辱<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">rǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>没<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">mò</rt></ruby><ruby>自<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zì</rt></ruby><ruby>己<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jǐ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>辱<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">rǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>没<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">mò</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">le</rt></ruby><ruby>父<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">fù</rt></ruby><ruby>亲<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">qīn</rt></ruby>，<ruby>必<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bì</rt></ruby><ruby>用<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yònɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>火<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">huǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>将<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jiānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>她<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>焚<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">fén</rt></ruby><ruby>烧<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shāo</rt></ruby>。

“<ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Zài</rt></ruby><ruby>弟<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dì</rt></ruby><ruby>兄<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xiōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>中<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>作<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zuò</rt></ruby><ruby>大<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dà</rt></ruby><ruby>祭<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jì</rt></ruby><ruby>司<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">sī</rt></ruby>，<ruby>头<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tóu</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shɑnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>倒<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dào</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">le</rt></ruby><ruby>膏<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">ɡào</rt></ruby><ruby>油<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yóu</rt></ruby>，<ruby>又<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yòu</rt></ruby><ruby>承<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">chénɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>接<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jiē</rt></ruby><ruby>圣<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shènɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>职<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhí</rt></ruby>，<ruby>穿<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">chuān</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">le</rt></ruby><ruby>圣<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shènɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>衣<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yī</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby>，<ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>可<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">kě</rt></ruby><ruby>蓬<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">pénɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>头<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tóu</rt></ruby><ruby>散<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">sàn</rt></ruby><ruby>发<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">fà</rt></ruby>，<ruby>也<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yě</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>可<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">kě</rt></ruby><ruby>撕<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">sī</rt></ruby><ruby>裂<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">liè</rt></ruby><ruby>衣<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yī</rt></ruby><ruby>服<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">fú</rt></ruby>；

<ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>可<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">kě</rt></ruby><ruby>出<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">chū</rt></ruby><ruby>圣<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shènɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>所<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">suǒ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>也<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yě</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>可<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">kě</rt></ruby><ruby class="CharOverride-1">亵<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xiè</rt></ruby><ruby class="CharOverride-1">渎<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dú</rt></ruby><ruby>神<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Shén</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby><ruby>圣<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shènɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>所<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">suǒ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>因<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yīn</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>神<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Shén</rt></ruby><ruby>膏<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">ɡào</rt></ruby><ruby>油<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yóu</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby><ruby>冠<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">ɡuān</rt></ruby><ruby>冕<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">miǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>头<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tóu</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shɑnɡ</rt></ruby>。<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>华<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">huá</rt></ruby>。
